title: codereview: interference score formula mismatch between spec, pseudocode and test vector
description: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:23,45,310 and test/vectors/ccp15.json:25 - vector uses busy_pct + (PER*100) =47 for inputs 35/0.12; pseudocode suggests weighted 0.6/0.4. Normative section added weighted version. Must reconcile to one formula with test vector update if needed. P1 correctness.
